comments: pH meter calibrated with pH 4.0 and 7.0 buffers. Calibration certificate attached.
Conductivity meter verified with 1413 µS/cm standard. OK.

step_name: Vessel Pre-use Inspection - 200L Stainless Steel Vessel
comments: Vessel clean tag verified. Previous cleaning log reviewed. No visual defects.
WFI TOC < 0.5 ppm verified. Conductivity < 1.1 µS/cm. Lot: WFI-2024-0315-A.
NaCl lot: NaCl-2024-022. CoA verified. Weighed on calibrated balance SCL-BLNC-02.
KH2PO4 lot: KPM-2024-018. CoA verified. Weighed on calibrated balance SCL-BLNC-02.
Na2HPO4 lot: DSP-2024-031. CoA verified. Weighed on calibrated balance SCL-BLNC-02.
Agitator set to 60 RPM. Visual vortex confirmed. No foaming observed.
Volume verified via calibrated level sensor LS-04. Adjusted to 190.2L - within tolerance ±1%.
Pre-adjustment pH measured. Outside target range 7.35-7.45. NaOH addition required.
1N NaOH added dropwise with continuous stirring. NaOH lot: NAO-2024-009.
Post-adjustment pH outside specification 7.35-7.45. Additional HCl required. See deviation DEV-2024-0112.
1N HCl added to lower pH. Lot: HCL-2024-007.
Final pH within specification 7.35-7.45.
Conductivity within specification 9.0-10.0 mS/cm.
Final volume adjusted. WFI QS to 200L. Volume verified via calibrated level sensor.
10mL sample collected aseptically for bioburden analysis. Sample ID: BB-USP001-2024-0315.
Bubble point test performed. Filter: Millipore Durapore 0.22µm Lot FLT-2024-0201. Pre-use integrity PASS.
Filtration complete. Filtrate collected in sterile 200L bag. No abnormal differential pressure observed.
Post-use bubble point BELOW minimum acceptance criterion of 35 psi. Filter integrity FAIL. See deviation DEV-2024-0113.
Filtered volume recorded as 174.2L. Discrepancy vs pre-filtration volume exceeds 5% tolerance. Investigate yield loss.
Post-filtration pH check within specification. No shift observed.
Temperature logger confirmed 2-8°C storage maintained. Buffer stored in cold room CR-02.
Label applied: Product PBS Buffer 1X Batch USP-001 Mfg Date 2024-03-15 Exp 2024-04-14 Volume 199.6L.
Batch record reviewed. All entries complete. Deviations referenced. Batch disposition PENDING bioburden results.
